glosses.vi: đã kết hôn; đã lập gia đình
glosses.ja: 既婚; 結婚している

sentences.target: Je suis marié depuis deux ans.

translations.fr: Je suis marié depuis deux ans.
translations.en: I've been married for two years.
translations.es: Estoy casado desde hace dos años.
translations.de: Ich bin seit zwei Jahren verheiratet.
translations.vi: Tôi đã kết hôn được hai năm.
translations.nl: Ik ben al twee jaar getrouwd.
translations.hi: मैं दो साल से शादीशुदा हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι παντρεμένος εδώ και δύο χρόνια.
translations.nb: Jeg har vært gift i to år.
translations.id: Saya sudah menikah selama dua tahun.
translations.sv: Jag har varit gift i två år.
translations.da: Jeg har været gift i to år.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the sentence subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 1st person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Past participle used adjectivally; masculine singular predicate adjective describing marital status, agreeing with 'Je'.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase indicating duration or starting point; here marks duration with 'deux ans'.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'ans' to indicate quantity.
Common noun meaning 'years'; plural; head of the prepositional object governed by 'depuis'.

sentences.target: Elle est mariée et très heureuse.

translations.fr: Elle est mariée et très heureuse.
translations.en: She is married and very happy.
translations.es: Ella está casada y muy feliz.
translations.de: Sie ist verheiratet und sehr glücklich.
translations.yue: 佢已經結婚，而且好開心。
translations.pt: Ela é casada e muito feliz.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã kết hôn và rất hạnh phúc.
translations.nl: Ze is getrouwd en erg gelukkig.
translations.hi: वह शादीशुदा है और बहुत खुश है.
translations.nb: Hun er gift og veldig lykkelig.
translations.id: Dia sudah menikah dan sangat bahagia.
translations.sv: Hon är gift och väldigt lycklig.
translations.da: Hun er gift og meget lykkelig.
translations.fi: Hän on naimisissa ja hyvin onnellinen.
translations.ja: 彼女は結婚していて、とても幸せです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; sentence subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to predicate complements.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally); feminine singular predicate adjective agreeing with 'Elle'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate components ('mariée' and 'très heureuse').
Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective 'heureuse'.
Adjective, feminine singular; predicate adjective describing emotional state, agreeing with 'Elle'.

translations.en: They have been married for a long time.
translations.es: Están casados desde hace mucho tiempo.
translations.pt: Eles são casados há muito tempo.
translations.vi: Họ đã kết hôn từ lâu.
translations.nl: Ze zijn al lange tijd getrouwd.
translations.hi: वे बहुत समय से शादीशुदा हैं.
translations.el: Είναι παντρεμένοι εδώ και πολύ καιρό.
translations.da: De har været gift i lang tid.
translations.ja: 二人は長い間結婚しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); sentence subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally); masculine plural predicate adjective agreeing with 'Ils'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement; here marks duration with the adverb 'longtemps'.
Adverb expressing extended duration; complement to 'depuis' in the prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Le couple est marié depuis hier.

translations.fr: Le couple est marié depuis hier.
translations.en: The couple has been married since yesterday.
translations.es: La pareja está casada desde ayer.
translations.de: Das Paar ist seit gestern verheiratet.
translations.it: La coppia è sposata da ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对夫妻自昨天起已婚。
translations.yue: 這對夫婦自昨日起已婚。
translations.ru: Пара состоит в браке со вчерашнего дня.
translations.pt: O casal está casado desde ontem.
translations.vi: Cặp đôi đã kết hôn từ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Het stel is sinds gisteren getrouwd.
translations.hi: यह जोड़ा कल से शादीशुदा है.
translations.el: Το ζευγάρι είναι παντρεμένο από χθες.
translations.nb: Paret har vært gift siden i går.
translations.id: Pasangan itu sudah menikah sejak kemarin.
translations.sv: Paret har varit gifta sedan i går.
translations.da: Parret har været gift siden i går.
translations.fi: Pari on ollut naimisissa eilisestä lähtien.
translations.ja: そのカップルは昨日から夫婦です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for the noun 'couple'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally); masculine singular predicate adjective describing marital status.
Preposition indicating the starting point in time; introduces the temporal complement 'hier'.
Adverb of time functioning as the complement of 'depuis' to mark the start of the state.
